name: Mindtell Technology Limited
summary: Mindtell Technology Limited, an investment holding company, provides information technology (IT) services in Malaysia and Singapore. It operates through System Integration and Development Services, IT Outsourcing Services, and Maintenance and Consultancy Services segments. It is involved in the design, procurement, installation, and maintenance of customized system applications for corporate customers. The company offers NS3, a square intelligence solution; and CUSTPRO, a customer relationship management system. It primarily serves customers in private and public sectors, including banks and financial institutions, government and statutory bodies, educational institutions, IT service firms, software principals, and other small and medium enterprises. Mindtell Technology Limited was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Subang Jaya, Malaysia.
